codeReview.summary: All requirements fully met. Dependencies installed (@dnd-kit/core@6.3.1, @dnd-kit/sortable@10.0.0, @dnd-kit/utilities@3.2.2, thirdweb@5.119.1). .env created with all 5 placeholder API keys. .gitignore properly excludes .env files. SQL migration snippets contain all 10 new CREATE TABLE statements plus 2 ALTER TABLE statements with indexes, RLS policies, and updated_at triggers. TypeScript types in types.ts accurately mirror the SQL schema for all 10 new tables and the 2 modified tables (agents, companies), following the existing Row/Insert/Update pattern correctly. All verification passed: npm test (4/4), typecheck clean, build succeeds.

issues.description: All RLS policies use wide-open 'USING (true) WITH CHECK (true)'. This is explicitly acceptable per the mission spec's Non-Functional Requirements for hackathon scope, but should be tightened post-hackathon.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The synthesis-worker skill mandates 'Write Tests First (TDD)' for all features. For environment setup features (install deps, create .env, write SQL file, update type definitions), there are no meaningful tests to write. The worker correctly skipped TDD and noted this in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges. The skill procedure could be amended to clarify that TDD applies to code/behavior features, not config/setup tasks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill SKILL.md section '### 2. Write Tests First (TDD)' — applies generically. Worker's skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'The synthesis-worker skill mentions Write Tests First (TDD) but for a pure setup feature... there are no meaningful tests to write.'

sharedStateObservations.observation: The git repo root is at /Users/gratitud3 (home directory), not the project directory. The worker had to discover this and work around it (files were added with full relative paths from home). This was subsequently documented in AGENTS.md under 'Known Pre-Existing Issues', so the gap is already resolved for future workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows multiple git commands exploring repo topology: 'git rev-parse --show-toplevel' returned '/Users/gratitud3'. Worker's discoveredIssues[1] notes: 'Git repo root is at /Users/gratitud3 (the home directory), not at the project directory.'

summary: PASS. The foundation-setup feature is fully implemented and verified. All 4 committed files (.gitignore, package.json, src/db/migration-snippets.sql, src/integrations/supabase/types.ts) are correct. The SQL migration file contains all 10 new tables (agent_wakeup_requests, agent_task_sessions, issue_documents, issue_comments, cost_events, agent_identities, agent_execution_logs, agent_invoices, user_onboarding, integrations) plus ALTER TABLE statements for companies.wallet_address and agents columns — each with proper indexes, RLS policies, and triggers. TypeScript types accurately mirror the SQL schema. The .env file (not committed, correctly gitignored) has all 5 required placeholder keys. Dependencies installed successfully. Build, tests, and typecheck all pass. No blocking issues found.
